title: Creamy Mushroom and Mushroom Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful bowl filled with sautéed mushrooms, creamy sauce, and a touch of Dutch spice.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt 1 tbsp of molten butter over medium heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp of molten butter, briny feta cheese, and Dutch mustard.
Stir until the cheese is melted and the sauce is creamy, about 2 minutes.
Transfer the mushroom mixture to a large bowl.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
